data.name: Fire of Life: New Day
data.detailed_description:
A new year starts at the Oakland Institute, where everything seems normal for college students.


Except for a Fiery Redhead shaking things up for a young man.



Or a young magic user getting used to living in this world after being secluded in a pocket dimension.



Or a group of shapeshifters either trying to dominate or survive.


There seems to be always a vampire ready to make a power play for domination that make it seem like the demons are the sane ones. All these forces in one town are a powder keg ready to explode.

Fire of Life: New Day is part one of a series of planned Adult Visual Novels that follows five different storylines (fae, vampire. mage, shifter, and demon) that interconnect at different points. There is not a single main character, but you can customize it by being able to rename characters to your liking. It uses Renpy to facilitate the story, so the normal features (Replay, Galleries, and Save Options) are included. In addition to those features, there are content filters (NSFW and Content Warning) that lead to alternate scenes for individuals. :)

Fire of Life: New Day is part one of a series of planned Adult Visual Novels that follows five different storylines (fae, vampire. mage, shifter, and demon) that interconnect at different points. There is not a single main character, but you can customize it by being able to rename characters to your liking. data.short_description: A Supernatural Visual Novel covering Fae, Demons, Mages, Vampires, Shifters, and sometimes..humans.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or Higher (64-Bit)
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Uses Renpy 8+ (64-Bit)
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Version: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Game is non-notarized.

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu / SteamOS
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
